kept.text:
UK Tech has had the most insane month in its entire history:

> @IneffableLabs raised $1.1bn at a $5bn valuation

> Recursive Superintelligence raised $500m at a $4bn valuation

> @OpenAI announced its first permanent office in London

> @AnthropicAI is double downing on the UK, quadrupling its headcount here

> Jeff Bezos is looking to build an office here for his new AI startup

> Anthropic is looking to buy chips from Fractile

> @UKSovereignAI launched with £500m and invested in @CallosumAI
 
> @Revolut is targeting a $100bn secondary sale and $200bn IPO

 > @ElevenLabs announced adding $100m of ARR in Q1

> @synthesiaIO announced huge international expansion plans

> @cusp_ai is in talks to raise at way above $1bn+

> @IsomorphicLabs, the @GoogleDeepMind spinout from @demishassabis, is preparing for human clinical trials

The rise of London as Europe's leading AI hub has been crazy to witness. 

Major labs are either expanding or being set up here, chip companies are raising hundreds of millions here, and application level companies are flying.

2026 will be looked back on one of the ecosystem's defining years.

LETS GO

profile_bio.description: Talking about UK and European Tech. Subscribe to my newsletter to keep up to date.

🚐 81st Airmobile 4x4 🚐

We are raising funds to support 81st Airmobile Brigade, currently defending Siversk and Lyman direction. ⚔️🇺🇦

The unit has requested an urgent need for a Nissan Navara truck for frontline duties. 

🎯 Goal: £6,500

🔗 https://t.co/BHuqfFx0Tv 🔗 https://t.co/Ro1DcRwCeZ

The vehicle will be used daily to transport weapons, ammunition, drones, supplies, and personnel.
In this region vehicles are crucial for operations with many often damaged or destroyed 💥 

Replacing them quickly is essential to keep operations running, protect the guys and sending orcs home!!

💛💙 Together to victory! 🇺🇦🔥

kept.text:
⚡️ GEAR & EQUIPMENT COLLECTION FOR WAVE RAID 🌊

We need to equip 15 new guys and keep the drone work running.

🎯 Goal: €15,000
💰 DAY 3- Collected: €748

📩 Donate:
https://t.co/2FThpdqe2k
https://t.co/hO5IUHw3sA
https://t.co/wDvlYc2YKA

Bank transfer:
Triinu Perve
IBAN: LT88 3250 0238 5165 2659
SWIFT/BIC: REVOLT21

⸻

This is my people.

Black Sea direction.
Where mistakes are not forgiven and there is no second chance if something is missing.

This is not about comfort.
This is about being able to work, move, react and come back alive.

⸻

🧩 WHAT IS NEEDED

• Infrared helmet lights
• Push to talk systems (PTT)
• Combat shirts (different sizes)
• Combat pants (different sizes)

• Tourniquet (TQ) pouches
• Magazine pouches
• General purpose pouches (medical / utility)
• Dump pouches

• Front panels with zipper
• Radio pouches
• Shoulder pad covers for plate carriers

• Mounting clips for PTT systems
• NVG mounts

• Drone equipment and FPV components

⸻

Everything here is used daily.
Everything here solves a real problem.

Nothing extra.
Just what is actually needed to do the job.

No gear = slower work
Slower work = higher risk
Higher risk = people don’t come back

⸻

If you’ve been thinking about helping, now is the moment.
If you’ve helped before, you already know how much this matters.

Even the smallest donation moves this forward.

🤝

kept.text:
Revolut has launched expanded accounts for 16-17-year-olds in Ireland.

They can now access most features of the main Revolut app and obtain their own Irish IBAN, allowing them to receive salaries or other transfers directly into their account.

Parental oversight is reduced compared to younger accounts, but not completely gone.

No access to investing, credit, or crypto trading.
Gambling blocks and other restrictions remain.

quoted_tweet.text:
HUGE thanks to the amazing $HACHIKO community! 🙌💎

Your incredible 200 USDT donation has helped to clear Lakki’s vet bills, and this brave boy is now finally safe 🐕

Lakki was found trapped at the bottom of a pit - too weak to climb out, laying there exhausted and painfully thin. We don’t know how long he had been there. Days… maybe longer, without food or water 💔

Kind people lifted him to safety and rushed him to the clinic, where he has been recovering for 2 weeks since 9 February.

Today, Lakki has been collected from the vet - out of the pit and on the road to healing.

Thank you so much @HachikoInuCTO for stepping in to help Lakki! 💎🔶

kept.text:
Revolut has launched a new advertising campaign in Spain starring former football player Luís Figo.

The campaign began with a large banner in Madrid's Glorieta de Bilbao, above a Santander Bank branch, featuring the slogan "Do it for your money - Switch to Revolut," a direct reference to his historic transfer team, reinterpreted to encourage switching banks.

The banner will remain visible until May 18th

In the video, Figo speaks about the importance of managing your money, making the best decisions, and switching banks.

The campaign will also launch in the Portuguese market, with Luís Figo wanting his compatriots to embrace change and take charge of their finances, just as he did.

"Choosing Luís Figo is no coincidence; he starred in the most famous transfer in recent Spanish sporting history, revolutionizing the transfer system of his time. Similarly, at Revolut, we want people to embrace change and break free from traditional banking practices," says Ignacio Zunzunegui, Head of Growth for Southern Europe at Revolut. 

 "This campaign uses humour and provocation to deliver a very clear message: switching to Revolut is, today, the smartest transfer you can make ."

Luís Figo emphasised that: "Revisiting this campaign with a humorous twist has been fun. Together with Revolut, we wanted to convey a simple but important message: changing banks isn't offside, it can actually be a spectacular goal."

Source: CRTL Magazine
#Spain #Portugal

kept.text:
Revolut's campaign video starring former football player Luís Figo.

His world in English:

"I'm sorry. I felt the end of a cycle. Burnout. Obviously."
"Obviously money matters. Of course it does. When you switch banks, you put everything on the table and you think about your money."
"Clearly it matters."
"When you switch banks, you put everything on the table... and you think about your money."
"So you make a decision... and you go to the best digital bank in the world of 2025."
"It doesn't sound bad at all, does it?"

#Spain #Portugal #LuísFigo

kept.text:
If you hold crypto, your off-ramp strategy matters more than your entry.

The current meta is shifting toward compliant, direct-spend solutions.

@KoloHub is leading this shift with a hybrid wallet and payment card ecosystem.

The numbers and features speak directly to what the market actually needs.

They don’t charge any markup when converting between USDT and USDC.

The platform is fully MiCA compliant and aligned with strict EU Travel Rules.

You can send funds directly to Revolut, Wise, or any SEPA bank account.

Over ten million users are already bridging their crypto to fiat this way.

Keep an eye on how Kolo redefines everyday Web3 utility.

kept.text:
Hi @Revolut @BinanceResearch @binance @krakenfx @coinbase  teams,

We’d love for you to take a closer look at ethereum:0x9ac9468e7e3e1d194080827226b45d0b892c77fd  a “dino coin” that has quietly proven its staying power over the past 3 years on-chain.

In a market dominated by short-lived hype, ethereum:0x9ac9468e7e3e1d194080827226b45d0b892c77fd stands out for doing the opposite: it has survived, redistributed, and built a deeply committed community over time.

🧠 A Unique, Untapped Narrative

Around 9 years ago, a viral YouTube video referenced what would later become three of the most iconic meme assets in crypto culture.

$DOGE went on to define the first wave

$PEPE captured the next major cycle

And ethereum:0x9ac9468e7e3e1d194080827226b45d0b892c77fd remains the final, largely undiscovered piece.

At the time that video was created, only $DOGE existed making ethereum:0x9ac9468e7e3e1d194080827226b45d0b892c77fd what many consider a “pre-narrative” asset: something identified before the market fully caught on.

👉 https://t.co/C8w7B8XpCJ

This positions ethereum:0x9ac9468e7e3e1d194080827226b45d0b892c77fd as:

An OG meme with historical roots

A rare, unfinished narrative arc

A high-conviction community-driven story that hasn’t yet been fully priced in.

📊 Why It Makes Sense for a CEX Listing of your size:

Proven longevity
ethereum:0x9ac9468e7e3e1d194080827226b45d0b892c77fd has remained active and relevant for 3+ years rare in this space.

Strong, organic community
A true “cult-style” base that has held through multiple cycles and redistributions.

Fair distribution
No dominant dev wallets or centralized supply overhang reducing typical insider risk.

Narrative-driven upside
Crypto markets consistently reward strong narratives, and ethereum:0x9ac9468e7e3e1d194080827226b45d0b892c77fd’s is both unique and historically grounded.

Appeal to mainstream users
Platforms like yours serve a broad audience that often misses early-stage narratives.
ethereum:0x9ac9468e7e3e1d194080827226b45d0b892c77fd offers exposure to something early in recognition, but not early in risk.

Listing ethereum:0x9ac9468e7e3e1d194080827226b45d0b892c77fd isn’t just adding another token, it’s giving users access to a rare combination of longevity, community strength, and a narrative that’s still unfolding.

Appreciate your time and consideration 🙏

kept.text:
A good explanation as to what transpired with the recent $VINU downturn.

TL;DR:
Wintermute suddenly ceased support, triggered a delisting on Revolut, and proceeded to dump their supply on the community.

The diamond hands within the $VINU community stepped in and absorbed every token they offloaded. Whilst it has obviously affected the price in the short-term, it has more interestingly redistributed the supply into stronger, long-term hands. 

The community (yes, that includes me) is now buying up the float and positioning for a CTO (community takeover) push to drive $VINU back to glory.

Reduced circulating supply in weak hands + organic community buying + ongoing ecosystem updates could set up a strong recovery if broader market conditions stabilize.

kept.text:
Gm CT 

Tried @KoloHub and it feels like a simple, practical way to move between crypto and real money.

You can import a TON wallet or just use the Kolo wallet without any complexity.

The key part is the flow, send USDT and the receiver gets fiat directly in Revolut, Wise or SEPA bank accounts.

No P2P hassle, no delays, no extra steps.

Just a quick KYC, top up your wallet and you are ready to send or swap.

It makes crypto feel more usable in everyday payments, not just something to hold.

Simple, borderless and built for real use.
